title: FindingsSummary
description: Structured summary output for the CXR summary step.

is_normal.description: True if the study shows no acute/clinically significant findings.

salient_findings.description: Mapping of anatomical location -> list of findings at that region, e.g. {"right lower lung": ["round opacity", "possible effusion"]}. Multiple findings for one region go in that region's list. Empty if normal.

source_model.description: Identifier of the model that produced this summary.
